summary: Updated the GitHub pull request template and qd workflow documentation so qd-driven PRs capture node identity, acceptance evidence, validation commands, evidence and report paths, platform status, residual risks, and DAG changes.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: PR template captures qd node id, acceptance criteria, validation commands, evidence paths, completion and audit report paths, platform validation status, residual risks, and DAG or topology changes.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md contains dedicated qd evidence, verification, platform status, risk, and DAG sections.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Cross-device and opposite-platform validation fields are clearly marked as applicable only when relevant.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md marks cross-device and opposite-platform validation lines with "when relevant".

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Existing qd workflow docs remain aligned with the template.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: docs/QD_WORKFLOW.md now lists the same required PR description fields as the template.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Markdown lint and repo hygiene checks pass.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Required validation commands passed and are recorded in evidence/m4-pr-template-qd-evidence-contract/commands.log.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: No product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, or latency claim is made.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Changes are limited to documentation/template fields and node evidence; no product behavior claims are introduced.

realWorldValidation.evidence: This is a documentation and PR-template node; platform-specific runtime validation is not required.
